$comment: Planters (design §3): built structures that improve a specific node or dig site, paid in OTHER zones' goods (the backward flow — Zone 3 timber has a job in Zone 1). Bushcraft-gated (the Carving Bench unlocks them). kind: basketCapacityMult (a bigger basket at a node), nodeYieldMult (a second yield lane), digSpeedMult (steady a dig site's sketching). target: node | digSite. One of each planter per target. Reset at Migration (except the Almanac's First Planting — a later slice). The clay-bed 'regrowth' planter is deferred until a regrowth mechanic exists. Material bundles + values are first guesses.
